---
title: ""
---

# Fuminari (Fumi) Miura

Senior Researcher at Dutch National Institute for Public Health and the Environment (RIVM)  

<div class="contact-icons">
  <a href="mailto:your@email">
    <i class="bi bi-envelope"></i>
  </a>
  <a href="https://github.com/fmiura" target="_blank">
    <i class="bi bi-github"></i>
  </a>
  <a href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?hl=en&user=Ns1zkzAAAAAJ" target="_blank">
    <i class="bi bi-mortarboard"></i>
  </a>
  <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/fuminari-miura/" target="_blank">
    <i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i>
  </a>
</div>

<div class="about-image">
  <img src="images/profile_RIVM.jpg" alt="Fuminari Miura">
</div>

## Research focus
<!-- to be updated -->
- Real-time outbreak analytics
- Designing targeted control strategies
- Epidemic theory for decision making
- Low dimensional representation of dynamical systems
